summary.para: Provides a set of configuration options you can use to customize the settings used when starting a Cloud Build.
The specific version of the Android SDK to build your project with.
The BuildTarget of the Build Profile to be built in the cloud.
The Id of the Build Automation credentials to use to sign your cloud build.
The specs of the machine used to build your project in the Cloud.
The family of Operating System Build Automation will use to build your project on.
The specific version of the Operating System to use when building your project in the cloud.
Whether to use Silicon or Intel version of the Unity Editor.
The version of Xcode to use when building your project in the cloud.
Provides the display information for a custom settings section in the Build Profile window.
Callback that determines if the settings object this provider describes can be added to the given build profile.
Display name for the settings section in the Build Profile window.
When the value is true, Unity uses a custom implementation of an Editor. Otherwise, Unity displays the default inspector for the settings object.
Tooltip text for the custom settings section. If this value is empty, no tooltip is displayed.
Specifies if a settings object applies for a build profile and makes it available as a new section in the Build Profile window.
